case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOCELYN I ANTONIO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOCELYN I ANTONIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED APR-01-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIO, JOCELYN I AKA   JOCELYN IVONNE MANUEL ANTONIO
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $561.68 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIO, JOCELYN I AKA   JOCELYN IVONNE MANUEL ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
